caption: The scene takes place in a formal meeting room where several men are seated at a long white table decorated with a floral arrangement. The men are dressed in light-colored button-down shirts. In the center, a man with glasses sits beside another man who is gesturing with his hand while speaking. Various graphics and text overlays are present across the screen, including the "NEWS18" logo and "MANAREDH" branding with a time stamp of "10:08 PM". The top-left frame features text reading "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने सप्प्राट चौधरी", while the top-right changes to "बिहार के डिप्टी CM बने सप्परा". The bottom-left and top-right frames share a headline stating "कांग्रेस छटपटाई, तेजस्वी की 'पिक्चर' बाकी है", and the bottom-right frame displays "JDU कोटे से मंत्री बने विजय". Sidebars identify individuals as "डिप्टी CM", "मंत्री", and "मुख्यमंत्री नीतीश कुमार", with accompanying headshots of men such as "संतोष सुमन" and "सुमित कुमार".
